name: remote_mcp_server_per_hosting_provider
friction: Need real MCP servers deployed across multiple hosting providers to measure actual latency
input: none — servers are deployed manually, one per hosting provider
output: 8 live MCP servers, one per hosting provider — endpoints listed in mcp_servers_under_test.json in the pipeline registry
when_to_use: When you need the list of live MCP endpoints under test, or want to verify that all servers are up and responding
when_not_to_use: When you need latency measurements — use the pinger components instead
